title: I Am Already Wealthy Right Now
subtitle: An affirmation for landing fully in the abundance already present rather than pushing past it toward the next goal
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 78 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names present-tense gratitude for the wealth already filling daily life, not as a consolation but as the foundation for everything that expands from here.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 78 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning when gratitude for current wealth keeps getting deferred until the next milestone is reached.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 78 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 78 opens Week 12 with the theme of living abundance as normal. The statement names gratitude as a present-tense fact: the wealth is already here, and this is the moment to feel it.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice what it does when you let it land before moving on to the day.
I feel deep gratitude for the wealth that already fills my life. I am already wealthy right now.
Adapted from the Day 78 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
